stemHtml: Where ILS siting causes difficulties due to nearby buildings or mountainous terrain, MLS is can replace it because it...

options.a: has an omnidirectional coverage area, allowing curved approach paths close to the airport.
options.b: operates at a higher frequency, reducing the effect of ground reflections.
options.c: offers more frequencies, allowing for an optimum frequency for the specific geographical area.
options.d: makes use of one carrier wave, preventing interference between different frequencies.
